title: 2. Proposed Product  Platform & Model Name (Continued)
text_content: For the most rapid regulatory clearances internationally, the product name on the submission documents needs to match the name to be cleared and used in marketing the device. Upgrades and Conversions: Upgrades from a previous version to HAL 4.0 can be made in some countries where HAL 4.0 is cleared. The details of which countries allow this will be detailed later in the project. For China, the system updates cannot engage any re-labelling activities, the information on device label should not be changed, such as manufacturing date, model name, NMPA license number etc. . Conversions from Halcyon to Ethos radiotherapy sytem can be made in some countries. Conversions involve changes to the covers, installing and enabling the Ethos TPS (On-couch session manager or OSM) function and changing the nameplate to include “Ethos Radiotherapy System” while manufacturing date and serial number remain the same. The UDI will be updated to describe the changed model. Regulatory Plan Revision Doc Number
